prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your quarter life crisis forward
items: Complete a comprehensive skills and interests assessment using online tools and personal reflection
Write down your current values and priorities in a structured list, ranking them from most to least important
Schedule and conduct 3 informational interviews with professionals in fields that interest you
Create a personal financial snapshot by calculating your net worth and monthly cash flow
Research and document 5 potential career paths that align with your skills and interests
Identify and connect with a mentor or trusted advisor who has navigated similar life transitions
